prestazioni: VK56VD 5.6L V8 engine: Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 4340 steel connecting rods, JE Pistons 2618 forged pistons (9.5:1 compression), and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings for 800+ HP reliability under forced induction.

Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegate, custom 4-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust by Tomei (304-grade mandrel-bent piping), and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise 28-32 psi mapping on E85.

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with custom wiring harness by iWire, paired with a Bosch Motorsport 0280158802 2000cc high-flow fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors, and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup for crankcase ventilation.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (Y62-specific fenders, rocker extensions, and rear bumper flares) with custom matte bronze powder coating and exposed carbon fiber weave for the front splitter and rear diffuser.

OEM+ aggressive stance via KW Suspensions Variant 3 coilovers (Y62-specific valving) with -40mm front and -35mm rear drop, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami 20x12 +30 wheels (front) and 20x13 +40 (rear) wrapped in Toyo Open Country R/T Trail 305/50R20 tires.

Full custom interior overhaul featuring Recaro Pole Position seats (Y62-specific mounting brackets), Takata Drift Series 4-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, MIG-welded) with integrated LED accent lighting by Diode Dynamics.
